title: Surgeon Vacancy at GE Healthcare India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at GE Healthcare India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? GE Healthcare India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About GE Healthcare India:
GE Healthcare India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GE Healthcare India!
